name: thisday-youtube-upload

scripts.test:unit: node test-history-expert.js && node test-narration-expert.js && node test-blog-quiz-expert.js

comment:overrides: Pin node-fetch below 2.7.0: 2.7.0 throws ERR_STREAM_PREMATURE_CLOSE on gzipped responses (e.g. the Google OAuth token endpoint) under Node 18+, which broke YouTube uploads on 2026-06-25.
